CustomField.description: Queue DeveloperName (file basename of the queue's queue-meta.xml). CaseTriggerHandler maps the Case's post-assignment OwnerId to a Reason__c value via this field. Must match an existing Queue exactly — a missing match falls back to a sentinel reason rather than a stamp.
CustomField.inlineHelpText: DeveloperName of the Queue this reason applies to.
CustomField.label: Queue Developer Name
